name: @rederive/request
description: Verified-recompose of request@2.88.2's PURE helper core (the deprecated HTTP client). The SIR firewall carves the pure leaves out of the HTTP effect spine; this package verifies the leaves, the spine is declared for trace-oracle follow-up.
provenance: see sir.manifest.json — pure helper core of request@2.88.2 (Apache-2.0; deprecated 2020), oracles stamped by executing the real original
